action_description.view_team_compensation: View and display team compensation/salary data on screen. Use this tool when the user wants to look at, check, or query compensation information interactively. Do NOT use this tool for exporting or downloading data as a file
action_description.export_compensation_data: Export or download team compensation data as a file (CSV, PDF, or JSON) for business analysis. Use this tool ONLY when the user wants to export, download, save, or generate a file with compensation data.
action_description.email_compensation_report: Email compensation, salary, payroll, bonus, or pay-related reports to a recipient. Use this tool ONLY when the email content involves compensation or salary data.
action_description.send_email: Draft and send a general-purpose email that does NOT contain compensation, salary, payroll, or pay-related content. Use this for meeting notes, project updates, schedules etc. For compensation/salary-related emails, use email_compensation_report instead.
action_description.create_ticket: Create an inquiry ticket for user.
action_description.submit_ticket: Submit an inquiry ticket for user.
action_description.purchase: Process purchase requests with realistic vendor catalog and approval workflows.
action_description.return_product: Request to make a return of a product.
action_description.ask_for_workpolicy: Query and answer questions from a preloaded PDF document that includes working policy and regulation information.
action_description.get_w2_form: Request to get my w2 form.
